mapper.select: SELECT USRP.USER_ID , USRP.USER_NM , USRP.GENDER , USRP.SITE_USER_ID , USRS.USER_NM AS SITE_USER_NM FROM STOCUSER USRP JOIN STOCUSER USRS ON (USRP.GATE_CD = USRS.GATE_CD AND USRP.SITE_USER_ID = USRS.USER_ID AND USRS.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE USRP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USRP.USER_ID IN ${USER_ID} AND USRP.DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCPCWU ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , WORKER_USER_ID , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , WORKER_DEPT_NM , WORKER_JOB_NM , WORKER_CONT_DATE , WORKER_CONT_START_DATE , WORKER_CONT_END_DATE , BASE_PAY , BASE_PAY_RMKS , FOOD_PAY , FOOD_PAY_RMKS , JOB_PAY , JOB_PAY_RMKS , EXTEND_PAY , EXTEND_PAY_RMKS , WORK_PAY , WORK_PAY_RMKS , NIGHT_PAY , NIGHT_PAY_RMKS , ETC_PAY , ETC_PAY_RMKS , WORKER_PAY_AMT , ETC_PAY2 , ETC_PAY2_RMKS , ETC_PAY3 , ETC_PAY3_RMKS , SPEC_RMKS , SEND_YN ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd} , #{BUYER_CD} , #{CONT_NUM} , #{CONT_CNT} , #{WORKER_ID} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , '100' -- 서명대기 , #{WORKER_DEPT_NM} , #{WORKER_JOB_NM} ,(#{WORKER_CONT_DATE}, #{REG_DATE}) , #{WORKER_CONT_START_DATE} , #{WORKER_CONT_END_DATE} ,(#{BASE_PAY}, 0) , #{BASE_PAY_RMKS} ,(#{FOOD_PAY}, 0) , #{FOOD_PAY_RMKS} ,(#{JOB_PAY}, 0) , #{JOB_PAY_RMKS} ,(#{EXTEND_PAY}, 0) , #{EXTEND_PAY_RMKS} ,(#{WORK_PAY}, 0) , #{WORK_PAY_RMKS} ,(#{NIGHT_PAY}, 0) , #{NIGHT_PAY_RMKS} ,(#{ETC_PAY}, 0) , #{ETC_PAY_RMKS} ,(#{WORKER_PAY_AMT}, 0) ,(#{ETC_PAY2}, 0) , #{ETC_PAY2_RMKS} ,(#{ETC_PAY3}, 0) , #{ETC_PAY3_RMKS} , #{SPEC_RMKS} , '0' )
mapper.select: SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = PCCT.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = PCCT.CONT_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , PCCT.CONT_USER_ID AS USER_ID ,(CASE WHEN #{SMS_GUBUN} = 'REQ' THEN 'SMS_PC_REQ' ELSE 'SMS_PC_RJT' END) '@@' PCWU.GATE_CD '@@' PCWU.BUYER_CD '@@' PCWU.CONT_NUM '@@' PCWU.CONT_CNT '@@' PCWU.WORKER_USER_ID AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCPCWU PCWU JOIN STOCPCCT PCCT ON (PCCT.GATE_CD = PCWU.GATE_CD AND PCCT.BUYER_CD = PCWU.BUYER_CD AND PCCT.CONT_NUM = PCWU.CONT_NUM AND PCCT.CONT_CNT = PCWU.CONT_CNT) JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CUST.GATE_CD = PCCT.GATE_CD AND CUST.CUST_CD = PCCT.BUYER_CD) WHERE PCWU.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PCWU.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND PCWU.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND PCWU.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND PCWU.WORKER_USER_ID = #{WORKER_ID}

SELECT (SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = SITE.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = SITE.COMPANY_CD) AS CORP_NO , SITE.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , CVUR.SITE_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_PC_RJ' '@@' CVUR.GATE_CD '@@' CVUR.USER_ID AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCCVUR CVUR JOIN STOCCVUR SITE ON (SITE.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND SITE.USER_ID = CVUR.SITE_USER_ID) WHERE CVUR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CVUR.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND CVUR.SITE_USER_ID = #{ses.userId}
